name: 6pk Carrot Taper Candle Set - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your home with this charming set of six carrot taper candles from Threshold. Crafted from paraffin wax, each candle stands 8 inches tall and features a single wick for a clean, steady burn. The vibrant carrot orange hue adds a pop of color to any setting, while the unscented design ensures they complement any environment without overpowering it. Perfect for creating a warm, inviting atmosphere.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
